issues.description: Exact Production gold evidence availability is insufficient.
issues.impact: QA cannot reliably see evidence needed for required claims.
issues.workaround: Expose limitations and keep QA non-Production.
issues.fix_plan: Improve evidence retrieval and parsing alignment under the frozen protocol.

issues.description: AI-assisted 30-sample citation support is 16.7% strict and 23.3% lenient.
issues.impact: Citation IDs can be valid while cited evidence does not support the claim.
issues.workaround: Do not describe current QA as Production-ready.
issues.fix_plan: Improve claim-evidence binding and repeat representative human review.

issues.description: Context optimization did not improve end-to-end QA quality.
issues.impact: Pure retrieval gains do not establish answer-quality gains.
issues.workaround: Retain the accepted negative result and frozen default.
issues.fix_plan: Prioritize evidence availability and claim coverage over more tuning.

issues.description: jina-reranker-v3 did not pass enablement quality/latency gates.
issues.impact: Enabling it would regress or destabilize the current path.
issues.fix_plan: Re-evaluate only after evidence retrieval quality changes.

issues.description: Deep Research quality evaluation has not run.
issues.impact: Report and citation quality are unknown.
issues.workaround: Limit claims to bounded engineering smoke.
issues.fix_plan: Run quality evaluation only after retrieval and QA citation prerequisites pass.

issues.description: Successful end-to-end live completion after resume is not verified.
issues.impact: Settlement, reservation release and final citation validation after resume remain unproven.
issues.workaround: Checkpoint/resume idempotency is accepted only as an engineering partial pass.
issues.fix_plan: Perform one controlled resumed success when provider connectivity is stable.

issues.description: Repeated ConnectError occurred on q049 resumed attempts 4 and 5.
issues.impact: Successful resumed provider completion is externally blocked.
issues.workaround: Preserve failed attempts and do not auto-retry live calls.
issues.fix_plan: Add approved provider health verification before a controlled rerun.

issues.description: Local HTTP Qdrant connection carries an API key warning.
issues.impact: Credentials could be exposed on an untrusted network.
issues.workaround: Use only an isolated local network.
issues.fix_plan: Enable TLS or remove the API key from untrusted HTTP transport.

issues.description: qdrant-client 1.18.0 and server 1.12.5 emit a compatibility warning.
issues.impact: Behavior across unsupported version distance is not guaranteed.
issues.workaround: Do not upgrade either side independently.
issues.fix_plan: Pin and verify a compatible pair, then rerun retrieval and restore checks.

issues.description: The 30-item citation audit is failure-stratified and AI-assisted.
issues.impact: Its support rates cannot be extrapolated as full-dataset precision or independent double-blind review.
issues.workaround: Report its exact sampling scope with every use.
issues.fix_plan: Create a representative independently reviewed audit after P0 fixes.

issues.description: First-token latency is unavailable in non-streaming JSON mode.
issues.impact: Interactive latency cannot be decomposed to first token.
issues.workaround: Use total latency for current acceptance.
issues.fix_plan: Measure first-token latency only if a streaming structured protocol is adopted.

issues.description: SiliconFlow free mode records explicit zero price, but free quota and policy may change.
issues.impact: Future cost may not remain zero.
issues.workaround: Require explicit billing mode and cost basis per run.
issues.fix_plan: Add paid-price configuration and budget validation before paid use.
